mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative in >55% of months following a rate cut.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 9.0%, consumer spending contraction and corporate earnings deterioration force equity prices lower over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns exceed +2.0% in >60% of periods where UNRATE remains above 9.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous monthly increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate broad-based consumer demand recovery, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the following month.
failure_condition: The joint positive signal yields negative 20-day returns in >50% of observed months.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly industrial production growth above 0.5% signals manufacturing capacity utilization recovery, generating positive short-term equity momentum over the next week.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth >0.5% is followed by negative 5-day SPX returns in >55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI increase exceeding 0.4% triggers expectations of premature monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day returns are positive in >65% of months following CPI MoM > 0.4%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent monthly payroll gains exceeding 100,000 and a declining unemployment rate confirm labor market stabilization, supporting positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal fails to predict positive 20-day returns in >50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth above 1.0% annualized reflects expanding economic output and corporate revenue, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the subsequent week.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth >1.0% is followed by negative 5-day SPX returns in >55% of quarters.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between contracting industrial production and expanding retail sales signals supply chain bottlenecks and inventory mismanagement, depressing equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: This divergence pattern yields positive 60-day SPX returns in >60% of observed months.
